children.label: getIndicesByIndexMode
description: Get indices by their mode (lookup or time_series).

children.label: mode
description: The mode to filter indices by.

children.label: remoteClusters
description: Optional comma-separated list of remote clusters to include.

returnComment: A promise that resolves to the indices autocomplete result.

children.label: getAllIndices
description: Get all indices, aliases, and data streams for ES|QL sources autocomplete.

children.label: scope
description: The scope to retrieve indices for (local or all).

children.label: projectRouting
description: Optional CPS project routing value. When provided it is forwarded

returnComment: A promise that resolves to an array of ESQL source results.

children.label: getViews
description: Get all ES|QL views from the cluster (GET _query/view).
signature: () => Promise<{ views: { name: string; query: string; }[]; }>
returnComment: A promise that resolves to the views response (list of view names and queries).

children.label: getInferenceEndpoints
description: Get inference endpoints for a specific task type.

children.label: taskType
description: The type of inference task to retrieve endpoints for.

returnComment: A promise that resolves to the inference endpoints autocomplete result.

children.label: getPolicies
description: Get enrich policies formatted for ES|QL autocomplete.
signature: () => Promise<{ name: string; sourceIndices: string[]; matchField: string; enrichFields: string[]; }[]>
returnComment: A promise that resolves to an array of enrich policy objects.

children.label: getColumns
description: Get columns for an ES|QL query by executing it with LIMIT 0.

children.label: esqlQuery
description: The ES|QL query to get columns for.

returnComment: A promise that resolves to an array of ESQLFieldWithMetadata.

functions.label: buildServerESQLCallbacks
description:
Builds the ESQLCallbacks required by the ES|QL validation API
({@link validateQuery} from @kbn/esql-language) for server-side usage.

Uses the Elasticsearch client directly instead of going through
Kibana HTTP routes, unlike the client-side callbacks in @kbn/esql-utils.
